items.t: 팀 쿡 "가격 올린다", 마이크론 폭등…우주에서 하강하는 스페이스X? [김현석의 월스트리트나우]
items.fullText: 월스트리트나우 김현석의 월스트리트나우 팀 쿡 "가격 올린다", 마이크론 폭등…우주에서 하강하는 스페이스X? [김현석의 월스트리트나우] 입력 2026.06.19 07:49 수정 2026.06.19 07:49 기사 스크랩 기사 스크랩 댓글 댓글 기사 공유 공유 글자크기 조절 글자크기 프린트 프린트 김현석 기자 구독하기 구글 검색 선호 출처로 추가 Google 검색에서 한국경제 기사를 더 자주 볼 수 있습니다. AI 기사요약 뉴욕 증시는 연방공개시장위원회(FOMC)의 매파적 금리 전망에도 불구하고 미·이란 양해각서 체결에 따른 유가 하락 안정과 반도체 업종의 강한 상승 랠리에 힘입어 반등했습니다. 영상 모듈 닫기 한경 프리미엄9의 모든 콘텐츠는 한국경제신문의 저작물로 저작권법의 보호를 받습니다. 사전 허가 없는 무단 전재·복제·배포·캡처 공유·AI 학습 활용 및 상업적 이용을 금합니다. 위반 시 서비스 이용 제한 및 민형사상 법적 책임이 발생할 수 있습니다. 무료 열람 혜택으로 기사를 읽으셨습니다. 한경 프리미엄9을 구독하고 무제한으로 만나보세요. 구독하기 AI 뉴스 Q&A 더 궁금한 점이 있으신가요? 읽으면서 머릿속에 맴돌던 질문들, 앨리스가 대답해 드릴게요. 인공지능(AI)을 활용해 생성되었으며, 일부 내용에 오류가 있을 수 있습니다. AI 포인트 뷰 이전 분석 종목 다음 분석 종목 본 서비스의 AI가 제공하는 종목 정보는 정보 제공 목적의 참고 자료일 뿐, 투자 권유·자문·추천에 해당하지 않습니다. 투자에 따른 손실 책임은 사용자에게 있습니다. 좋아요 싫어요 후속기사 원해요 김현석 기자 시장은 항상 옳지는 않습니다. 하지만 맞습니다. 시장의 눈으로 세상을 봅니다. 관련 뉴스
items.takeaway: 스페이스X 주가 하락 우려가 투자 심리 악화

items.t: SpaceX Criticizes EU Proposal for Satellite Spectrum Tender
items.d: SpaceX criticized the European Union’s plans for the distribution of satellite spectrum, a key element in the growth plans for the Elon Musk-led company’s Starlink service following its record-setting initial public offering.
items.takeaway: EU 스펙트럼 제안 비판으로 사업 환경 불확실성 증가

items.t: President Trump Announces Apple and Intel Chip Collaboration | Bloomberg Tech 6/18/2026
items.d: Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow discusses the latest announcement made by President Donald Trump, which will see Apple and Intel joining forces to produce chips domestically, sending shares of the chipmaker higher. Plus, Anduril's CEO discusses how the company won a contract with the US Air Force to produce autonomous fighters. And, SpaceX wraps up its first full week of trading, with shares falling for a s
items.takeaway: 해당 뉴스는 스페이스X·우주발사체 테마와 직접적인 연관이 없습니다

items.t: Investors Anticipate Fresh Liquidity Following Historic SpaceX Debut
items.d: SpaceX's historic public debut comes during a critical inflection point as a wave of multibillion-dollar AI companies prepare to go public. With the unprecedented IPO, investors are anticipating a wide-scale "distribution event" that will give private markets the fresh cash it desperately needs. Matt Witheiler, Head of Late-Stage Growth at Wellington Management, thinks the private tech ecosystem w
items.takeaway: 스페이스X 상장 후 유동성 확대 기대감 상승

items.t: Investors Look Beyond Chips For Next Big Thing in Tech
items.d: As the AI hype continues to grow, investors are looking beyond chips to find the next big thing to revolutionize the tech sector. Ankur Crawford, Portfolio Manager at Alger, says there hasn't been a business like SpaceX before as markets react to the significance of the AI trade. She joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech".  (Source: Bloomberg)
items.takeaway: 해당 내용은 칩 분야를 넘어선 투자 기회를 다루지만 스페이스X와 직접적인 연관은 없습니다

items.t: Tesla Stock Underperforms SpaceX in First Week After IPO
items.d: Tesla Inc. stock is set to end the holiday-shortened week lower after SpaceX went public last Friday.
items.takeaway: 스페이스X IPO 첫 주 주가 상승, 투자 매력 강화

items.t: SpaceX Shares End First Week of Trading Up 37% From IPO Price
items.d: SpaceX stock ended higher in its first week of trading, even though its rough ride showed the largest-ever IPO was not immune to the type of share-price volatility that tends to rock big companies after they go public.
items.takeaway: 스페이스X 주식 1주일 만 37% 상승, 수익 기대감 고조

items.t: [스페이스X IPO와 0주 ②] 일본 3조 배정, 한국 0원…투자 기회 가른 제도
items.takeaway: 한국 투자자 배정 제외로 투자 기회 제한, 부정적 전망

items.t: 스페이스X, 다음은 테슬라와 합병?…머스크, 4조달러 제국 만드나
items.takeaway: 스페이스X와 테슬라 합병 소문은 아직 확인되지 않아 투자 판단에 직접적인 영향을 주지 않습니다

items.t: 우주항공청, 항공기 엔진용 소재·부품 개발 사업 본격 착수

SpaceX tops Amazon in market value as retail investors race to buy shares
items.d: “There is only one stock retail [investors] care about right now,” one research team wrote in a note to clients.
items.fullText: Markets SpaceX tops Amazon in market value as retail investors race to buy shares “There is only one stock retail [investors] care about right now,” one research team wrote in a note to clients. Listen to this article with a free account 00:00 00:00 SpaceX’s value now makes it the world’s fourth-largest publicly traded company, leapfrogging both Amazon and Microsoft. Ethan Swope / Bloomberg via Getty Images file Share Add NBC News to Google June 16, 2026, 10:09 AM EDT / Updated June 16, 2026, 4:12 PM EDT By Steve Kopack and Kayla Steinberg SpaceX shares continued to soar in their third day of trading Tuesday, gaining another 4.7% as buyer interest in Elon Musk’s largest company showed no sign of slowing down. Subscribe to read this story ad-free Get unlimited access to ad-free articles and exclusive content. Since SpaceX shares began trading on the Nasdaq on Friday afternoon, the company’s stock price has climbed nearly 35% from $150 to as high as $225, pushing its market value to $2.65 trillion. Shares on Tuesday closed at $201.68. The company debuted at a value of $1.77 trillion, and it has gained nearly $900 billion in value since then. SpaceX’s value now makes it the world’s fifth-largest publicly traded company, leapfrogging Amazon. Earlier in the day, it also briefly surpassed Microsoft to become the fourth-largest firm in the world. “There is only one stock retail [investors] care about right now,” researchers at Vanda wrote in a note to clients Monday night. “On a net basis, retail investors have now bought almost as much SPCX over the last two sessions as they bought across the entire US stock market last week,” they wrote, referring to the ticker symbol under which SpaceX trades. Forde Todd, 20, received three shares of SpaceX stock as part of the company’s initial public offering, then bought several more on the open market. He said Tuesday morning that between the shares he still has and the ones he sold, he was up around $600. “I was considering selling

Elon Musk becomes first trillionaire after SpaceX IPO
items.d: Elon Musk became the world's first trillionaire after his company SpaceX began trading publicly. SpaceX is the first of what is expected to be many major IPOs related to AI.

items.t: SpaceX sets IPO price at $135
items.d: Elon Musk’s SpaceX will begin trading with a price set at $135 per share, giving the company a valuation of $1.77 trillion and making it the largest-ever stock debut. NBC News’ Allie Canal explains.
